events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Welding without a qualified WPS is a direct AWS D1.1 violation (Clause 4/5 require qualified or prequalified procedures backed by a PQR) — the result is a **fail**, **critical risk**, since structural connection integrity can't be verified. Recommended actions: stop work, verify/establish a qualified WPS and welder qualifications, NDT the affected welds, and get engineer disposition before reinspection.
